hero.subtitle: Manask is a web-based task management app structured around Folder → Project → Task, combined with a Pomodoro timer and detailed performance statistics — helping you work more organized every day.

problem.title: Why do you need Manask?
problem.desc: Students, office workers, and freelancers all face the same challenge that hasn't been fully solved.
problem.card1_desc: Paper notes, simple to-do apps, or phone notes are all insufficient when the number of tasks grows. Everything mixes together, hard to categorize and easy to miss.
problem.card2_desc: When every task looks equally important, users easily fall into a state of busyness without effectiveness — doing a lot but finishing little.
problem.card3_desc: To-do list in one place, Pomodoro timer elsewhere, habit tracker somewhere else. Switching between apps breaks focus and wastes time.

mission.title: Manask was built to solve that
mission.desc1: Instead of a flat list, Manask allows task hierarchy across 3 clear levels: Folder → Project → Task. Each task is fully attributed: priority level, start date, due date, notes, and time spent.
mission.desc2: The Pomodoro technique is integrated directly into the workflow — no app switching needed. Users simply select the active task and start focusing immediately.
mission.desc3: All activity is recorded and displayed through a visual statistics system: heatmap, line chart, donut chart — helping you review and improve performance over time.

features.title: Everything you need in one place
features.desc: No need for 3 separate apps. Manask unifies task organization, focus, and statistics into a single interface.
features.card1_desc: A 3-level structure gives every task a clear place. Folders group large projects, Projects manage individual goals, Tasks are the specific things to do.
features.card2_desc: Each task has: priority level (High / Medium / Low), start date, due date, notes, and time spent — enough to accurately assess actual effort.
features.card3_desc: Select the active task, start the timer, and focus. Customize Focus, Short Break, and Long Break durations. No app switching — everything is right inside Manask.
features.card4_desc: 365-day activity heatmap, Donut chart by project distribution, Line chart trends for 7 days / 30 days / 12 months. Review performance and adjust your plan.
features.card5_desc: Sign up, log in, and store all data securely. Every folder, project, and task is synced separately per account.
features.card6_desc: Web app that runs directly in the browser, no installation needed. Dark mode by default, fully responsive — works on any device.

how.title: Get started in just 4 steps
how.desc: No lengthy instructions needed. Manask is designed so anyone can start using it right away.
how.step1_desc: Create Folders to group related projects (e.g. "Semester 2", "Work"). Inside, create Projects for each specific goal.
how.step2_desc: Create tasks with a name, priority level, start date, due date, and notes. Everything is organized clearly, no mixing up.
how.step3_desc: Select the active task, start the timer, and focus in cycles. Take short breaks between sessions to maintain energy.
how.step4_desc: Look back at activity heatmaps, trend charts, and streaks. Understand your work habits and adjust your weekly/monthly plan.

screenshots.title: Designed to be easy to use
screenshots.desc: Dark mode, fully responsive, every screen is optimized for the best user experience.

team.title: The people behind Manask
team.desc: Three students with one common goal: making task management truly organized.
team.member1_bio: Responsible for designing and building the entire user interface — from layout and animations to smooth interactive experiences.
team.member2_bio: Builds the server system, RESTful API, and database — ensuring every feature runs stably, securely, and efficiently.
team.member3_bio: Responsible for the entire visual direction and user experience — from UX research and wireframes to a consistent design system.

competition.title: Hanoi Youth Innovation Contest – 22nd Edition 2026
competition.quote: "Manask was developed to compete in the city-level contest organized under the direction of the Hanoi People's Committee — an annual intellectual playground to spark creative thinking and nurture the future inventors of the capital."
competition.detail1_sub: In coordination with: Hanoi Union of Science & Technology Associations, Department of Education & Training, Department of Science & Technology, Hanoi Youth Union
competition.detail2_sub: 1 of 5 key fields promoting technology applications in practice
competition.detail3_sub: Outstanding products will be selected to participate in the 22nd National Youth Innovation Contest

footer.contest: Competing in Hanoi Youth Innovation Contest · 22nd Edition
